name: @ai-portal/library-search
description: Tra cứu tài liệu thư viện - Excel/CSV (ProQuest, Springer, Elsevier, Sách in...)

scripts.pack:basepath: npm run build:basepath && PACK_BASEPATH=1 node scripts/pack.mjs
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.start: concurrently -n fe,be "npm run dev" "cd backend && python -m uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8001"
